Your Squad is Waiting.

The community for moms to connect, share wisdom, and find local support. Smooth, simple, and always here for you.

Everything You Need to Thrive

MumSquadUp is more than just an app; it's a lifeline for every stage of your motherhood journey.

Verified Community

Connect with real moms in a safe, vetted environment designed for meaningful interactions.

Local Meetups

Find playgroups and support circles right in your neighborhood. Never parent alone.

Expert Guidance

Get direct access to pediatricians, nutritionists, and parenting experts whenever you need.

Trusted Marketplace

Buy, sell, or swap baby gear with other local moms you can trust.

Take the Squad
with You.

Connect with moms on the go. Get instant notifications for local meetups, expert advice, and community updates.

MumSquadUp

Empowering moms to build stronger communities, one connection at a time. Join the squad today.
